Class OutboxMessageJpaEntity

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.OutboxMessageJpaEntity
@Entity public class OutboxMessageJpaEntity extends Object
JPA entity adapter for the outbox_messages table.

Supports the Transactional Outbox Pattern: records in this table are written atomically with business data and later relayed to RabbitMQ by the OutboxRelayScheduler.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Instant
    createdAt
    The timestamp at which this record was inserted.
    private String
    exchange
    The AMQP exchange name the message should be routed through.
    private UUID
    id
    Surrogate primary key.
    private String
    payload
    The JSON-serialized message payload stored as TEXT.
    private boolean
    published
    Whether this message has been delivered to the broker.
    private Instant
    publishedAt
    The timestamp at which the relay published this record to the broker.
    private String
    routingKey
    The AMQP routing key.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private UUID id
      Surrogate primary key.

    • exchange

      private String exchange
      The AMQP exchange name the message should be routed through.

    • routingKey

      private String routingKey
      The AMQP routing key.

    • payload

      private String payload
      The JSON-serialized message payload stored as TEXT.

    • published

      private boolean published
      Whether this message has been delivered to the broker.

    • createdAt

      private Instant createdAt
      The timestamp at which this record was inserted.

    • publishedAt

      private Instant publishedAt
      The timestamp at which the relay published this record to the broker.

  • Constructor Details

    • OutboxMessageJpaEntity

      protected OutboxMessageJpaEntity()
      Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.

    • OutboxMessageJpaEntity

      public OutboxMessageJpaEntity(UUID id, String exchange, String routingKey, String payload, boolean published, Instant createdAt, Instant publishedAt)
      Full constructor used by the persistence adapter.
      Parameters:
      id - the outbox message UUID
      exchange - the target AMQP exchange
      routingKey - the AMQP routing key
      payload - the JSON payload
      published - whether the message has been delivered
      createdAt - the creation timestamp
      publishedAt - the publish timestamp, or null

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the creation timestamp

      public Instant getPublishedAt()
      Returns:
